title: Verify existing implementation of zipArrays utility
description: Verify that src/utils/zipArrays.ts and src/utils/zipArrays.test.ts exist, tests pass, and the feedback injection mechanism (@kody --feedback) works correctly during the build stage as specified in the verification criteria.
existing_patterns: src/utils/zip.ts - Similar zip utility with tuple return type using Math.min for length calculation
src/utils/zip.test.ts - Test pattern with describe/it/expect from vitest covering two/three arrays, short arrays, empty arrays, single array, equal length, mixed types, and object elements
